name: raiox
description: RAIOX — replicable YouTube channel intelligence for VIU Studio. Pipeline per channel config: public fetch + Studio lifetime export (49col, dual view metrics) -> fact store -> gates -> diagnostic chapters (facts JSON + series CSV + manifest) -> validated documents (peça/one-pager/XLSX) -> raiox ask Q&A (backend-agnostic: claude-cli or API). Numbers are code-born, ever; LLM labels (write-once), writes and answers under the validator.
